versions.name: Belk Scout Camp
versions.summary: Cub Scout day camp in Midland, North Carolina, operated by the Mecklenburg County Council, offering STEM activities, archery, BB shooting, and obstacle courses for younger Scouts.

provenance.notes: Imported from camp-finder; raw description and sessions dropped (operational data stays at the council site). verified_at is camp-finder's own source-confirmation date; imported_at is when open-scout-api ingested it. The evergreen summary is original prose regenerated from that description, excluding dates/fees/schedules. camp_type classified from program_types.
